Location and Projects
Brantley Construction Company
Brantley Construction Company, LLC (BCC) is one of the largest Commercial General Contractors in the tri-county and has been serving clients throughout the Southeast for 40 years. BCC is a family-owned company, as we make each client feel like family.. BCC has vast experience constructing design-build and negotiated work, including hospitality, industrial, office, retail, medical, multi-family, and LEED-certified projects. BCC offers a wide range of services including preconstruction, project management, construction management, design build, build to suit, development, up-fit, property restoration, and LEED. BCC, founded in 1976, is headquartered in Charleston, SC with a Canton (Asheville), NC office. Brantley Construction welcomes the opportunity to team with you to construct a facility customized to your needs. For more information, please visit www.brantleyconstruction.com.
From BuildZoom: Brantley Construction Company, 8300 Dorchester Rd, North Charleston, SC (Owned by: Michael Brantley) holds a Residential/General Contractor license and 6 other licenses according to the Georgia license board.
Their BuildZoom score of 97 ranks in the top 18% of 79,084 South Carolina licensed contractors.
Their license was verified as active when we last checked. If you are thinking of hiring Brantley Construction Company, we recommend double-checking their license status with the license board and using our project planner to get competitive quotes.
